description: Compile blinded candidates into consent-gated review encounters.

effects.playable_result: Presents a pseudonymous candidate without labels or reviewer metadata.
Lets players submit a local rubric judgment or abstain.
Reveals gold label, agreement, and adjudication only after a valid consented join.

rules.reasoning_display: Explicit public deliberation and reviewed references only.

world_effects.completion: Shows calibration against consented gold where available.
world_effects.failure: Missing or invalid consent keeps the label sealed.
world_effects.interaction: Review, vote, abstain, and inspect aggregate agreement.
world_effects.spawn: A Gold Review Chamber appears in an isolated projection world.
